topology.rationale: Endpoint contracts are the backbone. Domains, workflows, and patterns help the agent author code and architecture decisions instead of only echoing endpoint trivia.
topology.domains: auth-domain, boundaries-domain, comments-domain, operational-constraints-domain, records-domain, schema-domain, webhooks-domain
topology.workflows: boundary-and-failure-workflow, endpoint-resolution-workflow, pagination-rate-limit-workflow, request-classification-workflow, schema-write-safety-workflow, webhook-verification-workflow
